name: Scalloped Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic measuring cup, place butter and melt it in the Microwave Oven for 1 minute.
2. Stir in flour and salt until smooth. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly.
3. Heat, uncovered, in the Microwave Oven for 5 minutes or until thickened and smooth. Stir occasionally.
4. Stir in cheese until melted.
5. Place 1 package of asparagus in a deep, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish.
6. Sprinkle half of toasted almonds over asparagus. Pour half of the sauce over the almonds.
7. Repeat layers with remaining asparagus, almonds, and sauce.
8. Heat, uncovered, in the Microwave Oven for 8 to 10 minutes or until heated through.
9. Before serving, sprinkle with paprika if desired.
